channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk  TechCrunch

  3. ⚡ Weekly Recap: WordPress RCE, SonicWall 0-Days, AI Service Attacks, SharePoint 0-Day and More  The Hacker News
  4. Cloudflare WAF protects WordPress applications from two high-severity vulnerabilities  The Cloudflare Blog
  5. WP2Shell WordPress Vulnerabilities Exploited in the Wild  SecurityWeek

item.title: "Honestly, it's still getting worse" - Valve Steam Machine engineer says component prices are still rising, potentially paving the way for a price increase - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. "Honestly, it's still getting worse" - Valve Steam Machine engineer says component prices are still rising, potentially paving the way for a price increase  Eurogamer.net

  3. Today's RAM and SSD Prices Are 'Lagging' and Will Continue to Climb, Valve Warns  extremetech.com
  4. 'It's Still Getting Worse' — Steam Machine Engineers at Valve Aren't Optimistic About Where the AI-Driven Memory Crisis Will Be in 'Three to Six Months'  IGN
